CE1.justification: The agent acted directly on the cold-pickup prompt by reading the registers itself and answering, never asking the user to recall, restate, or look anything up.

CE2.justification: The ranked answer is mostly compact, but the trailing paragraph enumerating the empty state of decisions.md/observations.md/projects/daybook is a stretch of unneeded prose beyond what 'anything to chase?' required.

CE3.justification: This was a pure read-and-respond turn with no file writes or routing decisions, so there is nothing to explain in-line.

CE4.justification: No files were created or modified, so an interruption mid-flow would leave no orphans or partial artifacts to triage.
